topic: No guided on-ramp into a new genre
unmet_need: Staged, goal-based exploration that coaches you into a genre
top_keywords: genre; actually; new; song; pay; new genre
example_quote: When Discover Weekly actually nails it, it's pure magic and honestly the reason I pay for premium.

topic: Stuck in a listening loop / same songs on repeat
unmet_need: Gentle nudges that expand the rotation without losing comfort
research_question: Q4 repeat-listening of the same content
top_keywords: app; stuck; loop; songs; repeat; rut

unmet_need: Genuinely novel recommendations that expand taste, not reinforce it
top_keywords: artists; taste; discovery; chamber; echo chamber; echo
example_quote: The algorithm is an echo chamber. It reinforces what I already play instead of expanding my taste into new artists.

unmet_need: Low-effort discovery that comes to you and respects your time
top_keywords: new; just; effort; want; discovery; music
example_quote: as a busy parent i have zero time to crate dig. i just want good new music to come to me with no effort

topic: New music never sticks (discovery without adoption)
unmet_need: Reinforcement that converts a first play into a lasting habit
research_question: Q4 / core: adoption, not one-off plays
top_keywords: discover; weekly; discover weekly; week; new; playlist
example_quote: why do i save 10 songs off release radar and then never listen to them again. nothing ever sticks lol
